metadata.description: Agent skills for building on Perfex CRM — core APIs, module dev, database, security, email, custom fields, and themes

plugins.name: perfex-crm-skills
plugins.description: 7 focused skills for Perfex CRM module development: Perfex core APIs and hooks (perfex-core-apis), module lifecycle (perfex-module-dev), schema and FK rules (perfex-database), token/CSRF/redirect security (perfex-security), transactional email with retry queue (perfex-email), custom fields with tblcustomfields quirks (perfex-customfields), and custom client-area themes (perfex-theme). Distilled from 3+ years of production Perfex usage.
